title: Expose projection-oriented MCP and CLI surfaces
summary: Exposed ad hoc projection reads as first-class MCP/query and CLI surfaces via prism.planProjectionAt(...), prism.planProjectionDiff(...), and the new `prism project <plan-id> --at/--diff` command, with prism-js type/docs updates, live daemon validation, and workflow capability registration.

acceptance.label: MCP and CLI surfaces use projection terminology consistently and expose freshness or source-plane information where it matters.
The resulting interfaces make projection requests first-class without confusing them for write-authority mutations.
